name: @maahaa-dev/chakravyuh
description: Entry is easy; the centre is earned. Chakravyuh is loop engineering for AI coding agents — an owned maker→checker→reviewer loop that drives an agent through concentric rings of verification (your tests, a checker, an independent reviewer) until a change breaks through review-ready onto a branch. From maahaa.dev.
author: Sushil Singh <sushilsingh2005@gmail.com> (https://maahaa.dev)
